name: Vodka Fettucine
recipeIngredient: 1 pound spinach fettuccini, cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Meanwhile, over medium heat, cook onion in hot butter until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add heavy cream and heat just to boiling.
4. Stir in tomato, tomato sauce, vodka, prosciutto (or ham), and frozen green peas.
5. Season with Parmesan cheese and Locatelli cheese, to taste.
6. Drain the cooked pasta and toss with the sauce.
7. Serve with additional cheese sprinkled on top.
